1. First, I need to initialize SESSION_STATE.md as per the rules
2. Open the webpage to get the job description
3. View the webpage to extract the content
4. Save the JD to a file
5. Run the hiring_pov.py script
6. Add YAML frontmatter to the markdown output
7. Return key highlights
